sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Na min a thang hi, A thokik Topa;
Na gualzo tawntung hi, sihna zo Topa.
Vantung mi
siangthote’n, Suangi lemkhia zo;
Na puante a maute’n, limtakin
kemzo

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Na min a thang hi, A thokik Topa;
Na gualzo tawntung hi, Sihna zo
Topa.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Han sung pan a tho, Jesuh’n hong muak hi;
Itna tawh hong dawnzo, launa
beita hi.
A pawlpite nuamin, zawhna lapi sa;
Topa hingkik tu-in, sihna gu
beita.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Kong muang lah nawn kei, hinna Kumpipa;
Nang lo hinna om kei, hong huh in
Topa.
Tulmawh nong itna in, hong gualzo sak den;
Jordan gungal kai-in Na inn hong tun hen.
